EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation that vouchers are sent 2 weeks after cooling off period.
EmailTemplate.name: Voucher - When
EmailTemplate.subject: Voucher Enquiry
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
All vouchers are sent out via email, 28 days after a policy start date.
Please do not hesitate to get in touch if you have any further queries.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
